description: WOX-Bin example pastes. Import via sidebar: Import file → choose this JSON. Try different languages in the Syntax highlighting dropdown to see Prism in action.

pastes.title: Welcome to WOX-Bin
pastes.content:
WOX-Bin is your personal paste and notes app.

• Create pastes: click + New or press Ctrl+N
• Save: Ctrl+S or the Save button
• Choose a language in the "Syntax highlighting" dropdown to get colored code (Prism)
• Use folders and tags to organize
• Export all pastes (backup) or Import this file from the sidebar

No account? Everything stays in your browser. With an account, pastes sync to the server.

pastes.title: Keyboard shortcuts
pastes.content:
Ctrl+N    New paste
Ctrl+S    Save
Ctrl+F    Find in paste
?         Open shortcuts panel

Use the "?" button in the toolbar or press ? (when not typing) to see this list in the app.
